scripts.build:renderer: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/facilitytrack run build
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:renderer && pnpm run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run start
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run rebuild:electron && pnpm run vendor:copy && node ./scripts/sign-and-build.mjs --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:win:publish: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run rebuild:electron && pnpm run vendor:copy && node ./scripts/sign-and-build.mjs --win nsis --publish always
